# Foorsa - Study in China for Moroccan Students

> Foorsa (فورصة) is Morocco's leading education consultancy helping Moroccan students study in China through university admissions support, scholarship guidance, and full application services.

## About Foorsa

- Founded in Morocco, serving Moroccan and North African students
- Partners with China's top 200 universities (all ranked in world's top 500)
- 4.9★ rating from 1,259+ Google reviews
- Alternate names: FUSAAA, Fusaaa, فورصة, Foorsa Consulting
- Website: https://foorsa.ma
- Languages: French (default), English, Arabic

## Services

- University admissions support for Chinese universities
- Scholarship search and application (CSC, university-specific, provincial)
- Free document translation
- Visa application guidance
- Pre-departure orientation
- Airport pickup and on-ground support in China
- Ongoing student support throughout studies

## Key Facts

- Tuition fees: $1,500–$6,000 USD per year depending on program
- Monthly living costs: $200–$350 USD
- Housing: $50–$300 USD per month
- Application process: 5 steps over ~6 months
- Intakes: September (main) and March

## Scholarship Types

- Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC) - Full scholarship covering tuition, accommodation, stipend
- University Scholarships - Partial to full tuition coverage
- Provincial Government Scholarships - Region-specific funding
- Confucius Institute Scholarships - For Chinese language studies
- Belt and Road Scholarships - For countries along the Belt and Road

## Programs Available

Over 80 majors including: Computer Science, Medicine, Engineering (Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Aerospace), Business, Architecture, Data Science, Cybersecurity, Pharmacy, Economics, and more.

## Partner Universities

Beijing Institute of Technology, Nanjing University, Shandong University, Hohai University, and 200+ other top Chinese universities.

## Contact

- Phone: +212-537-911271
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Foorsaconsulting
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/foorsa.ma/
